name: 11L Full GPTQ + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff Cache
blurb: 11L LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full Hessian GPTQ (within 600s budget) + multi-order backward-looking n-gram cache (orders 2-7, fixed alpha=0.40, min_count=2). GPTQ calibration reserved within training budget (train 586s + GPTQ 10s = 596s). N-gram cache is purely eval-time: counts built from already-scored tokens only, fixed-weight probability blend, no oracle selection. 3-seed mean: 0.9757 (std 0.0002).
author: Raahil Shah
